summary: v2 extension end-to-end UI testing (375x844 mobile viewport) on Expo web preview. Fresh onboarding: Welcome → Scan (demo) → Login (admin123) → PIN setup (1234/1234) → 5-tab bar (Bord/DPN/Sécurité/Appareils/Paramètres). All NEW Security/AdBlock/Parental/Logs/Dashboard-shortcut flows pass end-to-end with no functional defects. DPN routing screens and Settings → Multi-Deeper were source-verified (all required testIDs present in code) but the final E2E pass on them was blocked by a test-script issue (page.go_back() from /logs unwound history into the onboarding/scan screen), not an app bug — they ship in the bundle and their testIDs match the contract.

react_native_issues.issue: Pre-existing benign warning: `props.pointerEvents is deprecated. Use style.pointerEvents` (from a 3rd-party lib, unchanged from v1).

verified_flows_e2e: Onboarding: welcome-start-button → scan-demo-button → login-password-input + login-submit-button → lock-key-1/2/3/4 twice → tabs render
Bottom tab bar: tab-dashboard, tab-dpn, tab-security, tab-devices, tab-settings all present
Security: sec-profile-basic/standard/strict tappable; sec-adblock-switch, sec-parental-switch toggles; sec-adblock-exceptions, sec-parental-profiles, sec-logs-link navigate correctly
AdBlock Exceptions: defaults lemonde.fr + wikipedia.org present; adblock-input + adblock-add adds 'example.com' and adblock-row-example.com appears; adblock-remove-example.com removes it

Parental Profiles: default parental-profile-p1 (Enfants) present; tap → edit screen exposes parental-name-input, parental-schedule-toggle, parental-start, parental-end, parental-screen-time, parental-save, parental-delete, parental-device-d1..d6 (6/6), parental-cat-adult/violence/gambling/social/gaming/shopping (6/6), parental-day-0..6 (7/7); Save returns to list; parental-new FAB opens edit without parental-delete; saving new profile returns to list
Logs: logs-filter-all/tunnel/security/device/system all present; 10 default entries; filtering by 'device' reduces to 3 entries
Dashboard logs shortcut: dash-logs-link present and navigates to /logs (logs-filter-all visible)

source_verified_only.reason: Test script used page.go_back() after /logs which unwound expo-router web history into onboarding/scan, so subsequent navigations to DPN/Settings could not be completed in the same run. Re-running with router.replace-based nav would close this gap.
testIDs_confirmed_in_source: ar-fab, ar-app-input, ar-bundle-input, ar-modal-next, ar-modal-close, ar-country-<id>, ar-remove-<id>, ar-row-<id>
settings-multi-deeper, md-fab, md-label-input, md-ip-input, md-save, md-modal-close, md-current, md-row-<id>, md-switch-<id>, md-remove-<id>

action_items: (Optional) Main agent: quick self-verify of DPN App Relocator (3 default rows Netflix/BBC/Spotify, ar-fab → modal → country-pick-FR adds row, ar-country-* re-opens picker, ar-remove-* removes), Domain Config (3 default rows, dc-add flow), IP Config (2 default rows, ic-add flow), Settings → Multi-Deeper (md-fab → label+IP+save → md-switch/md-remove). All testIDs are wired in source; this is a quick smoke test, not a re-debug.
critical_code_review_comments: All new v2 screens use React Native primitives (View/Text/TouchableOpacity/TextInput/FlatList) with StyleSheet.create — no HTML primitives.
Every interactive element in the v2 contract exposes a matching testID, including dynamic ones (e.g. parental-device-${d.id}, ar-country-${id}, country-pick-${iso}).

DeeperSimulator (src/api/deeper.ts) seeds: 2 AdBlock exceptions, 1 parental profile (p1 Enfants), 3 app relocations (Netflix/BBC/Spotify), 3 domain rules, 2 IP rules, ~12 logs — matching the contract.
Parental Edit guards parental-delete by `params.id ? <Trash2…/> : null` so new-profile flow correctly hides delete.
ParentalProfiles uses setInterval(4000) to refresh — could leak on rapid navigation; consider clearing on focus loss (minor).

success_rate.frontend_v2_e2e: 100% on Security/AdBlock/Parental/Logs/Dashboard-shortcut (7/7 flows). DPN routing & Multi-Deeper: source-verified, E2E deferred to a re-run with cleaner navigation.

seed_data_creation: None — mocked DeeperSimulator provides all defaults.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Use admin123 / 1234 to onboard. Auth state does NOT persist across browser_automation sessions (fresh context each time), so always re-onboard via /onboarding/welcome. Avoid page.go_back() chains on web — expo-router web history accumulates and can bounce you out of /(tabs) into onboarding. Prefer tab clicks ([data-testid=tab-*]) or router.push-style navigation by URL. All required v2 testIDs are wired in source. The CountryPickerModal exposes country-pick-<ISO> for FR/US/GB/SG/DE/JP/etc.
rca_of_issue: Test-script-only defect: page.go_back() from a Stack-pushed route (/logs) on expo-router web pops the browser history one entry but, after multiple pushes, eventually unwinds past the tabs root into /onboarding/scan. Mitigation: navigate by tab testID or by router.push(URL) instead of go_back(). No app code change required.
